sections.paragraph:
an unused root.-

(1) pr. i.q. Ch. זוּז to move oneself about. [“Talmud. id.”] Hence מְזוּזָה and זִיז No. 1.

(2) From swiftness of motion it is figuratively applied to shining or radiating (comp. צִיץ and the very similar series of significations of דָּרַר), hence to spout forth like rays or in streams (speaking of milk), and the noun זִיז a full breast. [Note, in Thes. the order of these meanings is reversed.]
